code: export var COLORS={light:{primary:'#FFB6C1',primaryDark:'#FF91A4',primaryLight:'#FFD1D9',background:'#FFF8F0',hunger:'#FF6B6B',thirst:'#4ECDC4',hygiene:'#95E1D3',mood:'#FFE66D',intimacy:'#DDA0DD',text:'#4A4A4A',textLight:'#8A8A8A',textWhite:'#FFFFFF',button:'#FFB6C1',card:'#FFFFFF',statusHappy:'#4CAF50',statusNormal:'#FFC107',statusWorried:'#FF9800',statusCritical:'#F44336'},dark:{primary:'#FF91A4',primaryDark:'#FF6B7A',primaryLight:'#FFB6C1',background:'#1A1A2E',hunger:'#FF6B6B',thirst:'#4ECDC4',hygiene:'#95E1D3',mood:'#FFE66D',intimacy:'#DDA0DD',text:'#E0E0E0',textLight:'#A0A0A0',textWhite:'#FFFFFF',button:'#FF91A4',card:'#2D2D4A',statusHappy:'#4CAF50',statusNormal:'#FFC107',statusWorried:'#FF9800',statusCritical:'#F44336'}};export var getColors=function getColors(isDark){return isDark?COLORS.dark:COLORS.light;};export var SPACING={xs:4,sm:8,md:16,lg:24,xl:32};export var FONT_SIZES={xs:12,sm:14,md:16,lg:20,xl:24,xxl:32};export var BORDER_RADIUS={sm:8,md:12,lg:16,xl:24,full:9999};

sourcesContent:
export const COLORS = {
  light: {
    primary: '#FFB6C1',
    primaryDark: '#FF91A4',
    primaryLight: '#FFD1D9',
    background: '#FFF8F0',
    hunger: '#FF6B6B',
    thirst: '#4ECDC4',
    hygiene: '#95E1D3',
    mood: '#FFE66D',
    intimacy: '#DDA0DD',
    text: '#4A4A4A',
    textLight: '#8A8A8A',
    textWhite: '#FFFFFF',
    button: '#FFB6C1',
    card: '#FFFFFF',
    statusHappy: '#4CAF50',
    statusNormal: '#FFC107',
    statusWorried: '#FF9800',
    statusCritical: '#F44336',
  },
  dark: {
    primary: '#FF91A4',
    primaryDark: '#FF6B7A',
    primaryLight: '#FFB6C1',
    background: '#1A1A2E',
    hunger: '#FF6B6B',
    thirst: '#4ECDC4',
    hygiene: '#95E1D3',
    mood: '#FFE66D',
    intimacy: '#DDA0DD',
    text: '#E0E0E0',
    textLight: '#A0A0A0',
    textWhite: '#FFFFFF',
    button: '#FF91A4',
    card: '#2D2D4A',
    statusHappy: '#4CAF50',
    statusNormal: '#FFC107',
    statusWorried: '#FF9800',
    statusCritical: '#F44336',
  },
};

export const getColors = (isDark: boolean) => isDark ? COLORS.dark : COLORS.light;

export const SPACING = { xs: 4, sm: 8, md: 16, lg: 24, xl: 32 };
export const FONT_SIZES = { xs: 12, sm: 14, md: 16, lg: 20, xl: 24, xxl: 32 };
export const BORDER_RADIUS = { sm: 8, md: 12, lg: 16, xl: 24, full: 9999 };
